title: Workshops
text:
Workshop Listings
We offer a variety of workshops to help students improve the computational, data, and statistical literacies. Worshops that we deliver include:
Entry Level

R Fundamentals for Data Analysis
Python Basics for Data Analysis
Introduction to the Bash shell
Git and GitHub
Statistical Fundamentals: A Visual Approach

Intermediate to Advanced

Fitting Models to Data Not Data to Models
The Advance R Series: Clustering & Classification

More details on specific workshops can be found at https://csc-ubc-okanagan.github.io/workshops/
